quotes.text: The most underrated design tool is a napkin. The most overrated is Figma.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every time management introduces a new 'productivity tool,' productivity drops by 30% while everyone learns it, then returns to baseline.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best note-taking system is the one you actually use. Not the one you spend 47 hours setting up.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers don't just write code. They write the tools that help others write code.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best design tools are the ones that disappear. When you're designing, you shouldn't be thinking about the tool.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best tools are the ones you don't notice. They become extensions of your thinking.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your tools should serve you, not the other way around. If a tool adds complexity, replace it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your toolkit should be as small as possible. Each tool you add is a tool you have to learn and maintain.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best indie hacker tool is the one that saves you 10 hours a week. If it saves you 10 minutes, it's not worth building.
quotes.author: based
